title: athyrium × cornopteroides
intro: Athyrium × cornopteroides, also known as the Lady Fern, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Athyrium filix-femina and A. yokoscense, both native to Japan and East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Athyrium × cornopteroides include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Athyrium × cornopteroides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in herbal supplements and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
